donate.transparencyBeforeLink: Funds are used responsibly; if you need a receipt or have questions, reach out through our

terms.subtitle: Rules for using this website and related services.

privacy.subtitle: How we handle personal data on this website.

about.subtitle: Who we are, what we stand for, and how we serve Muslims and friends of the community in Korea.
about.metaDescription: Korea Muslim Community — who we are, what we do, and how we support Muslims across the Republic of Korea.
about.bodyAfterOrgName: (한국 무슬림 커뮤니티) is a community organisation for Muslims living, studying, and working across the Republic of Korea. We welcome families, students, professionals, and new arrivals who want to connect, learn, and support one another.
about.bodyP2: We host gatherings, educational programs, spiritual activities, and outreach that reflect Islamic values while respecting Korean law and the diverse society we share. Our work is voluntary, transparent, and open to cooperation with other groups where goals align.
about.bodyP3: This website shares public updates, resources, and ways to get involved. For membership services and internal tools, signed-in members can use the dashboard.
about.glanceFocusDd: Faith, education, mutual aid, civic participation, and welcoming new Muslims and residents.
about.missionLead: We help Muslims in Korea thrive in faith and daily life — through reliable information, community programmes, and practical support.
about.missionCard1Desc: Talks, study circles, and resources in Korean and English so members can grow in knowledge and confidence.
about.missionCard2Desc: Relief drives, newcomer support, and partnerships that turn compassion into action in our cities.
about.missionCard3Desc: We engage neighbours, institutions, and fellow citizens with clarity, respect, and a spirit of shared humanity.
about.ctaLead: Want to collaborate, volunteer, or learn more?

footer.brandTagline: 한국 무슬림 커뮤니티 · Community for Muslims in Korea
footer.description: Connecting Muslims across Korea through events, education, spiritual support, and mutual aid — open to everyone.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Korea Muslim Community. All rights reserved.

homeWhoWeAre.subtitle: 한국 무슬림 커뮤니티
homeWhoWeAre.bodyAfterOrgName: is a voluntary organisation for Muslims across the Republic of Korea. We host programmes, spiritual activities, and outreach that reflect our faith while respecting Korean society and the law.
homeWhoWeAre.bodyInvite: Whether you are new to Korea or have been here for years, you are welcome to connect, learn, and grow with us.
homeWhoWeAre.imageCaption: Connecting Muslims through education, gatherings, and service — open to everyone who shares our values.
homeWhoWeAre.highlightNationwideText: Muslims living, studying, and working across Korea — connected in dignity and mutual support.
homeWhoWeAre.highlightLearningText: Study circles, programmes, and spiritual gatherings rooted in Islamic values and Korean context.
homeWhoWeAre.highlightOpenText: We cooperate where goals align and welcome neighbours who share our values of service and unity.
homeWhoWeAre.highlightServiceText: Outreach, seasonal aid, and spaces where families and newcomers can find practical help.

homeDonationCta.title: Donate and Support
homeDonationCta.subtitle: Support Korea Muslim Community
homeDonationCta.description: Your gift funds programmes, relief, and welcoming spaces for Muslims across Korea — including how to give by bank transfer.

homeQuickContact.heading: Join with us
homeQuickContact.intro: Questions about programmes, volunteering, or how to connect with the community? Send a short message — we read every note.
homeQuickContact.emailHint: We reply when your message needs a response.
homeQuickContact.locationHint: Serving Muslims and friends of the community nationwide.
homeQuickContact.thanksStatus: Thanks — we saved your message. We will get back to you if a reply is needed.
homeQuickContact.toastSuccess: Thanks — your message was saved. We will get back to you if a reply is needed.
homeQuickContact.privacyNote: Your details are stored securely and used only to respond to your inquiry.

pageSidebar.pollQuestion: Do you support the chief adviser’s remarks that reform should come by December if minimal, otherwise elections by June?
pageSidebar.article1: Forget hostility and division — unite (Dr. Shafiqur Rahman)
pageSidebar.article2: Bloody 28 October: a grave crime against humanity in Bangladesh’s political history
pageSidebar.article3: Historic address by martyred Jamaat Amir Matiur Rahman Nizami before arrest
pageSidebar.article4: Professor Golam Azam’s address to the nation
pageSidebar.news1: Strong condemnation of lawsuits, attacks, and arrests by the fascist government
pageSidebar.news2: Hope for Bangladesh and India to play an important role in resolving outstanding issues

pageSidebar.news4: Ashura holds special meaning for Muslims worldwide

pageTeasers.article1Excerpt: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful. Constitution of Bangladesh Jamaat-e-Islami: because there is no god but Allah and His law applies throughout the universe.
pageTeasers.article2Excerpt: Bangladesh Jamaat-e-Islami emerged with Bangladesh’s independence in 1971 through the liberation struggle; it stands for sovereignty, territorial integrity, and Islamic values …
pageTeasers.article3Excerpt: Rules so that party or independent MPs cannot paralyse parliament by staying absent from sessions.
